name: CI change-class routing never runs DB-package RLS tests for migration-only diffs (two compounding holes)
description: Discovered during WI-676. The branch added a profile_id table (mentor_activity_ledger, migration 0111) with no RLS, yet CI never tripped the rls-coverage.test.ts [ASSUMP-F14] guard. Two compounding holes: (1) scripts/check-change-class.sh:223 emits the db-migrations class on pattern ^packages/database/drizzle/ but migration SQL actually lives in apps/api/drizzle/, so a migration-only diff never matches, never sets integration=true, and never opens the nx-affected test gate; (2) packages/database/project.json declares no test target and there is no packages/database/jest.config.ts, so @nx/jest/plugin auto-discovers no test target for @eduagent/database, meaning nx affected -t test never runs rls-coverage.test.ts regardless of the diff. Both must be closed together. This is a CI-infra fix that belongs on main, NOT inside the new-llm reconciliation (captured per new-llm-integration-analysis §3 slice note: capture, do not fix here).
acceptanceCriteria: Migration-only diffs touching apps/api/drizzle/**.sql route to a change-class that runs the database-package tests; @eduagent/database exposes a discoverable nx test target that runs rls-coverage.test.ts; red-green proof: adding a migration that creates a profile_id table without RLS fails CI pre-merge (and passes once RLS is added).
